overview: GYN 17 GYNECOLOGY TABLE, STAINLESS STEEL Gynecology bed with lithotomy position Stainless steel structure Backrest adjustment by gas spring Legrest adjustment manually, movable and fixed Three sections lying surface Removable mattress and mattress cover detachable, washable and waterproof Removable stainless steel fluid basin U shape cut on the seating area Stainless steel hand grips on both side of seat section Stainless steel side rails on both side of backrest Stainless steel foot step Detachable IV pole with 2 hooks, stainless steel Removable, height and angle adjustable PU padded knee supports Adjustable foot for un-even floor
